items.name: Mistform
items.effect: Once each round, you may negate one attack against you.

items.name: Nullward
items.effect: Once each round, you may negate one spell that targets you.

items.name: Driftstep
items.effect: When an attack hits you, you may immediately move one space.

items.name: Phantomfield
items.effect: You may move through enemies, allies, and obstacles. You may not end your movement inside one.

items.name: Treadlight
items.effect: You ignore the movement and damage payloads of Pales you stand in or move through.

items.name: Shadowmeld
items.effect: While wielding this, if you deal no damage this round you become Obscured at the end of the round.

items.name: Echosight
items.effect: You can see through darkness and concealment, and you cannot be hidden from or ambushed.

items.name: Afterimage
items.effect: Your first Evasion roll each round is a Lucky Roll.

items.name: Deathsong
items.effect: After you take damage, the attacker takes Base damage equal to your highest defensive attribute.

items.name: Oakspine
items.effect: You cannot be forcibly moved from your space.

items.name: Threshold
items.effect: No single hit can reduce your Vitality by more than half your current Vitality.

items.name: Emberhold
items.effect: Each time a hit would reduce you to 0 Vitality, you remain at 1 instead. Each time this happens, there is an even chance you die.

items.name: Mendseam
items.effect: At the start of each round, recover Vitality equal to your highest defensive attribute.

items.name: Scarweave
items.effect: At the start of each round, gain Temporary Vitality equal to your highest defensive attribute.

items.name: Runeguard
items.effect: Once each round, when an ally within your Mobility range is hit, reduce the damage they take by your highest defensive attribute.

items.name: Bulwark
items.effect: Once each round, when an ally within your Mobility range is targeted by an attack, you may make yourself the target instead.

items.name: Unbowed
items.effect: The highest Fatigue rank you can reach is 3.

items.name: Lastlight
items.effect: While below 25 Vitality, the first attack against you each round misses.

items.name: Ironroot
items.effect: Spells and abilities may target you, but they may not target the space you occupy.

items.name: Hexward
items.effect: The first Affliction applied to you each round is prevented.
